text:
(a) The department shall issue specially designed license plates to benefit the Foundation School Program. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with the Texas Education Agency.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the department shall deposit the remainder of the fee for issuance of license plates under this section to the credit of the foundation school fund.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.663 (Big Brothers Big Sisters License Plates) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(56), eff. September 1, 2015.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.664 — Foundation School Program License Plates

(a) The department shall issue specially designed license plates to benefit the Foundation School Program. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with the Texas Education Agency.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the department shall deposit the remainder of the fee for issuance of license plates under this section to the credit of the foundation school fund.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 504.663 (Big Brothers Big Sisters License Plates) by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1236 (S.B. 1296 ), Sec. 21.001(56), eff. September 1, 2015.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1102 (H.B.3677), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2013.*
